relationships.description: Increases grain and total dry matter yields of cereals
Increases topsoil Nmin levels compared to continuous cultivation
Increases early AM infection rates in cereal roots
Produces a larger increase in Nmin than cowpea
Produces a smaller increase in Nmin than groundnut
Acts as a poor host and suppresses nematode populations
Acts as a good host for nematode populations
Acts as a good host for nematode populations
Increases plant available nitrogen in the soil
Region characterized by these soil conditions
